samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output. Generates valid_out and data_out signals in the next clock cycle after receiving two data inputs.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data to be converted.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data resulting from the width conversion.</output>
    </ports>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="data_out" width="16">16-bit output data resulting from the width conversion.</reg>
        <reg id="flag" width="1">Flag signal indicating whether the second valid data has been received.</reg>
        <reg id="data_lock" width="8">Temporary storage for the first valid data input.</reg>
        <always @(*)>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                data_out <= 16'h0;
                flag <= 1'b0;
                data_lock <= 8'h0;
            end else begin
                if (valid_in && !flag) begin
                    data_lock <= data_in;
                    flag <= 1'b1;
                end else if (valid_in && flag) begin
                    data_out <= {data_lock, data_in};
                    flag <= 1'b0;
                end
            end
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Concatenates two 8-bit data inputs to generate a 16-bit output in the next clock cycle after receiving both inputs.</implementation>
</module>
```
